name: O.R.C. Wasp Drone
description: The O.R.C. Wasp Drone is the ranged harassment version of the wasp drone. It is still lighter than a standard wasp, but now uses spacing and projectiles far more intelligently.
behavior: It patrols high above O.R.C. zones and prefers punishing from mid-range before fully committing. If it finds a clean angle, it can keep the harassment going without needing to dive low.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and becomes very annoying if you cannot reach it quickly. The real problem is how well it sustains pressure while other enemies stop you from facing it directly.
interactionWithCreatures: It often acts as the aerial harasser in O.R.C. formations, attacking from behind while other units hold the front line.
strategy: Salty is still its biggest weakness. If you have to choose, bring the drone down first instead of tunneling on grounded enemies, because leaving it free means playing the whole fight under projectile pressure.

abilities.name: Sting
abilities.description: It closes just enough to sting and then tries to regain distance.

abilities.name: Stinger Shot
abilities.description: It fires projectiles to keep dealing damage and annoyance from outside close range.
